message:
test(core): add property-based tests for circuit breaker manager (ft-2p9cb.6.2.3)

17 proptests: BreakerState/Config serde, all-closed invariant, threshold
trip, open+closed=8, success resets failures, half-open recovery/reopen,
plan_recovery pipeline order, initiate_recovery duration, availability
bounds, batch equivalence, reset clears, snapshot/degradation/outcome serde.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
